/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/printguard-worker.dir/main.cpp.o" -o printguard-worker  ../../src/common/libprintguard_common.a ../../src/persistence/libprintguard_persistence.a ../../src/orchestration/libprintguard_orchestration.a ../../src/storage/libprintguard_storage.a ../../src/domain/libprintguard_domain.a ../../_deps/libpqxx-build/src/libpqxx-7.7.a ../../src/persistence/libprintguard_persistence.a ../../_deps/libpqxx-build/src/libpqxx-7.7.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpq.so ../../src/analysis/libprintguard_analysis.a ../../src/fix/libprintguard_fix.a -llcms2 ../../src/render/libprintguard_render.a ../../src/report/libprintguard_report.a ../../src/domain/libprintguard_domain.a ../../src/pdf/libprintguard_pdf.a ../../src/common/libprintguard_common.a ../../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libqpdf.so.29.9.0
